prompt: Minimal flat logo for a trading intelligence product called Vantage. Concept: a vantage point high above financial markets. Design options: a stylized mountain peak or cliff edge with a subtle upward arrow or chart line integrated into the silhouette, or an abstract eye / viewfinder looking down at a grid of market data. Clean geometric shapes, monochrome black on transparent background, no text, no gradients, suitable for a modern fintech SaaS product. Think Robinhood meets Bloomberg terminal aesthetic.
